meta.title: Jérémy Bazan — Senior QA Engineer · AI-augmented testing
meta.description: QA engineer and AI lead for my unit. I automate testing from web to embedded and augment it with AI — LLMs, agents, MCP.

hero.name: Jérémy Bazan
hero.title: Senior QA Engineer · AI-augmented testing
hero.thesis: Deterministic first, AI where it earns its place — QA stays the arbiter.
hero.pitch: QA engineer and AI lead for my unit. I automate testing from web to embedded and augment it with AI — LLMs, agents, MCP.

items.text: Release-validation time across the Web (Playwright) and Mobile (Appium / Maestro) stacks, by industrializing an automation strategy built from the ground up.
Open-source QA×AI portfolio: runs locally, with a systematic deterministic fallback. No external API key required.
Design time on the upstream phases an LLM can support: Definition-of-Ready checks, deriving acceptance criteria into passing and failing scenarios, high-level scoping of the test strategy.

repos.name: EvalForge
repos.description: LLM evaluation framework with a calibrated judge. Non-compensable deterministic checks, Cohen's kappa meta-evaluation.

repos.name: testscribe
repos.description: AI-assisted bug-report enrichment. CVSS-lite severity, IEC 62304 classes, semantic duplicate detection.

repos.name: skyguard
repos.description: AI-augmented security quality gate. Simulated avionics attack surface, agent-assisted STRIDE threat modeling.

repos.name: anomaly-sentinel
repos.description: Test framework for anomaly-detection AI. Medtech and fintech simulations, no API key required.

repos.name: flakysense
repos.description: Flaky-test diagnosis from CI history. Deterministic statistical analysis, optional AI layer. JUnit XML in, actionable report out.

repos.name: ReleaseGuard
repos.description: Explainable release gate. Merges tests, coverage and flakiness into a reasoned GO / CONDITIONAL GO / NO GO verdict.

items.label: Today
items.text: QA Engineer / QA Tech Lead at EDF Solutions Solaires (Limonest, France), AI lead for the unit. Scope: web, mobile, embedded.

items.label: Nearly 6 years in software quality
items.text: ISTQB Foundation v4 (2024). Bilingual French / English (professional experience in the United Kingdom).

items.label: Mobility
items.text: open to a permanent role in French-speaking Switzerland, Vaud in particular. French citizen, EU/EFTA freedom of movement.
